summary: Iteration 43: Complete testing of iToke slogan update and App Store configuration. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified via Playwright - welcome screen shows 'Ofertas que saem de Graca', admin 'Loja' tab has all editable fields, fiscal report uses DD/MM/AAAA format, /legal page shows 5 documents.

minor.issue: When config exists in DB with partial fields, it returns only those fields instead of merging with defaults. This is expected behavior but could be improved.

critical_code_review_comments: Slogan 'Ofertas que saem de Graca' correctly appears in welcome screen (line 119 of index.tsx)
Admin 'Loja' tab has all required fields: Nome do App, Slogan, Descricao Curta, Descricao Completa, Palavras-chave, Logo URL, Cor da Splash
Fiscal report date inputs use DD/MM/AAAA format with proper Brazilian date formatting
All 5 legal documents are displayed on /legal page with icons and versions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slogan update and App Store configuration fully tested. Backend APIs: GET /api/app-config (returns tagline 'Ofertas que saem de Graca'), GET /api/admin/app-store (returns store config), PUT /api/admin/app-store (updates store config). Frontend: Welcome screen shows correct tagline, Admin dashboard has 'Loja' tab with editable fields for app name, slogan, descriptions, keywords, logo URL, splash color. Fiscal report uses DD/MM/AAAA date format. Legal page shows 5 documents.

slogan_update.welcome_screen: Tagline 'Ofertas que saem de Graca' displayed correctly
slogan_update.old_slogan_removed: 'Descontos que valem ouro' NOT present anywhere

legal_documents.page_display: /legal page shows all 5 documents with icons

screenshots: .screenshots/admin_loja_tab.png - Admin Loja tab with editable fields
